documentation.description: Camera vision based attitude and position deltas.

record_types.name: Vision_Position_Delta

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (synced to UNIX time or since system boot).

fields.name: Time_Delta_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Time since the last reported camera frame.

fields.name: Angle_Delta
fields.description:
Units: [rad]
Defines a rotation vector [roll, pitch, yaw] to the current
MAV_FRAME_BODY_FRD from the previous MAV_FRAME_BODY_FRD.

fields.name: Position_Delta
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Change in position to the current MAV_FRAME_BODY_FRD from the
previous FRAME_BODY_FRD rotated to the current MAV_FRAME_BODY_FRD.

fields.name: Confidence
fields.description:
Units: [%]
Normalised confidence value from 0 to 100.
